---
title: "B.H. Choe"
about:
  template: trestles  # jolla  trestles  solana  marquee  broadside
  image: img/bchoe2017.png
  image-width: 16em
  image-shape: rounded # rectangle  round  rounded
  
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/byeonghakchoe/
    
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://www.twitter.com/climate_econ
    
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/bclog1
    
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Resumé
      href: https://bclog1.github.io/choe-cv.pdf
    
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: mailto:bchoe@geneseo.edu

---


Byeong-Hak is an Assistant Professor of Data Analytics and Economics. ......

## Education

University of Wyoming | Laramie, WY <br>
Ph.D. in Economics | Aug 2016 - Aug 2021 


## Experience

Center for Environmental Economics and Sustainable Policy, Arizona State University | Volunteer Research Assistant | Jan 2016 - May 2017
